channels.name: logistics-ops
channels.topic: Route reviews, shipment updates, dispatch coordination
channels.purpose: Logistics team ops. Route statuses, manifest issues, delivery coordination.
channels.creator: U_THUANG

channels.name: random
channels.purpose: Random non-work conversation: hobbies, weekend plans, off-topic chat.
channels.creator: U_THUANG

messages.text: Holiday volume starting. Stay on top of reviews this month.
Six routes in the queue this morning. Starting with Provo.
That's a jump from last week 😅
All six reviewed and dispatched. Provo and Logan went out first.
Good.
Five routes today. Layton and Park City are tight on the afternoon window.
Get layton out first.
All-hands moved to Friday 2 PM. Conference room. Mandatory.
All five delivered. Layton driver said the new route saves 12 minutes.
Anyone else getting the new manifest format from corporate? Mine has extra columns 😅
Yep. Just ignore the new columns for now, the dispatch system doesn't read them.
Andrew. Need Monday priorities sorted today. SLC county runs first, northern corridor second.
On it. I'll have the priority list posted by 6.
Good.
Priority list posted in the routes board. SLC county first, Logan and Ogden second tier.
Saw it.
Coffee machine in the kitchen is dying again. Anyone else getting half cups?
Yeah it spit out grounds in mine yesterday. Filing a ticket with facilities.
Need an extra body on Saturday for the holiday surge. Andrew you available?
I can do half day. Have a family thing in the afternoon.
That works. 7-12 then.
ok so for the api im thinking openrouteservice. free tier and it has the optimization endpoint built in
yeah google maps is way overkill for this. plus $$$
agreed. ors it is then. for the frontend just a simple flask app?
works for me. i mocked up a quick wireframe. input on left results on right
thats clean. ill build the input form this week
ill start the api wrapper. should have something by next thursday
Reminder: closed tomorrow and Friday for Thanksgiving. Critical-only coverage.
Office closed Thursday and Friday for Thanksgiving. Phones forward to dispatch.
Heads up: Park City route is going to be slow this week with the snow. Adding 30 min buffer.
Good call. PCA driver was sliding all day yesterday.
api wrapper is coming along. getting clean json back for 2-3 stop routes
nice try pushing it to 5 stops and see what happens
good idea ill test tonight
input form looks solid btw. clean layout
Holiday party Dec 19 at the Grand America. 6 PM. RSVP to HR by Friday.
Plus ones allowed? Asking for a friend 😅
Yes. Plus one allowed.
Where are we on the Q1 route optimization plan? Need a draft by end of week.
First draft is in shared drive. Walking through it Wednesday in our 1:1.
Fourteen routes queued this week. Split them.
I'll take eight. Jamie can handle six.
Works for me, I'll grab the southern runs 👍
Reminder, PTO requests for January need to go to HR by Friday.
Eight routes on my board today. Heads down until noon.
Last push before the break.
Six down, two to go.
All eight submitted and dispatched.
That's a record day 👍
Good work.
Last day before holiday closure. Going out for lunch, anyone want anything?
I'm good thanks. Trying to clear my queue before EOD.
Holiday hours: office closed 12/24-12/25 and 12/31-1/1. Dispatch on call only.
Welcome back. Q1 kickoff Wednesday 9 AM. Be ready.
Welcome back. Q1 plan needs to land by Jan 15. Get me the WVF onboarding draft this week.
On it. Will have the WVF lane proposal Wednesday.
Did anyone else's slack notifications break this morning? I had like 40 unreads at once 🤔
Mine were fine. Maybe restart the app?
fork is installed btw. rode it home from the shop, feels insane
told u dude. now we just need to get the route tool dialed before the demo
DUDE
i see it
it actually optimized the route. 23% shorter than manual order. this is real
ive been staring at it for 5 min. we actually built something that works
ill add input validation this weekend. this is so sick 🔥
WVF onboarding draft is up. Tagged @trevor for review.
Looking now.
Looks solid. A few notes in the doc. Let's discuss Tuesday.
FYI parking lot getting repaved next week. Use the south lot Tue-Thu.
Out for an appointment this morning. Back online by 11.
Back. Catching up on the queue.
New safety binders are on the shelf by the printer if anyone needs them.
WVF kickoff today. Andrew leading. Conference room at 10.
WVF kickoff went well. They want to start with the SLC metro lanes, expand to northern corridor in March.
Q1 numbers tracking ahead of plan. Good work.
Nice 👍
FYI snow day, school is closed. I'm WFH. Available on slack.
Same boat. Rosie's daycare is on a 2-hour delay.
found 3 bugs during testing tonight. logged them all in airtable
the multi-stop one is gnarly. off by one in the parser i think
yeah and the timeout on 8+ stops. just hangs
ill take the parser bug you handle the timeout?
Heads up, building HVAC is acting up again. Wear layers Monday.
Route sheets for this week posted. Provo runs are priority.
Pulling them now. I'll have Provo reviewed by 11.
Hey Andrew, Wasatch Valley manifest has a discrepancy on the pallet count. Should I call the warehouse?
I'll handle it. What's the manifest number?
WVF-0218-B. It's the Thursday run.
Provo routes approved. Three standard runs. Logan bumped to Wednesday per Trevor.
Standup in 5.
Reviewing Provo and Logan routes. Will dispatch by 9.
Ogden delivery confirmed for Thursday. Tracking updated.
Both out. Logan driver flagged a bridge closure on US-89, sent the detour.
St. George route pushed to next Monday. Driver availability issue.
Tomorrow morning's WVF batch needs to go out by 11. Don't let it slip.
Got it. Front-loading my morning, will dispatch all three by 11.
Weekly summary by EOD.
Sending in 10.
Getting a head start today. Provo manifest looks clean, submitting now.
Three WVF routes reviewed. Sending to manifest now.
Standup might be quick for me, already through the first review.
Provo dispatched.
Logan route reviewed and submitted. Flagged a weight issue on the SR-89 detour, rerouted through I-15.
Logan dispatched. OGD reviewing now.
Nice catch on the SR-89 flag 👍
OGD dispatched. All three out by 10. Will be away from desk briefly mid-morning.
All three reviews done and submitted. Stepping away for a bit, back before noon.
Andrew did you see the Layton dispatch flagged a damaged crate?
WVF wants to move the Thursday delivery up. Need a capacity check.
I can look into it, Andrew's stepped out. Give me a few.
Go.
Just back. Looking at Layton now.
Back. Jamie, thanks for covering that. Trevor, I'll confirm with WVF and update the route.
Good.
Layton driver took photos, posting in the thread. Looks like packaging damage in transit, not us. Filing the claim.
WVF confirmed. Moved the Thursday run to Wednesday, route updated in Airtable.
Good.
Layton claim filed with the carrier. Will follow up if I don't hear back by Tuesday.
WVF onboarding meeting moved to Thursday 10 AM, conference room B.
ok api timeout is fixed, pushed to main
tested w 12 stops works clean
Need you to review the Provo routes this weekend.
Today?
Three runs for Monday dispatch.
On it.
All three reviewed and submitted.
Good.
Three WVF routes for tomorrow are ready. Manifest in the system.
WVF wants to add 2 more lanes by April. Pull together capacity ask for next week.
On it. Will have a draft Friday.
Good. Send the Ogden manifest when ready.
Pulling it now.
Ogden manifest submitted.
Saw it.
First WVF routes submitted and approved. SLC metro and northern corridor going out today.
Nice, officially live then? That was a smooth onboarding 👍
Yep, all live. Cold chain monitors set up on both runs. Greg at WVF confirmed receiving is good to go.
Good. First week is critical. Zero excuses on the cold chain.
Capacity ask for WVF expansion is in shared drive. Bottom line: we need 1 more driver and 1 more truck by April 15.
Forwarding to finance. Probably can swing the truck. Driver is the harder ask.
DST started Sunday. Standup is still 7:15. Plan accordingly.
Andrew did Rosie's daycare get out early? You had a calendar block at 2 yesterday and I almost CC'd you on something.
Yeah she had a doctor visit. All good now, just an ear infection.
slides are about half done. keeping it to 8 slides total
whats the flow
problem, what routegenie is, how it works, live demo, future ideas. thats it
solid. map component is basically done btw. actual leaflet map with the route on it
Heads up, WVF wants to move their Tuesday SLC metro deliveries from 8 AM to 6 AM. Their produce manager says earlier drops help with morning prep at the stores.
That's pretty tight. Our Tuesday AM slots are already packed before 7. Would we need a dedicated truck?
Not necessarily. If we shift the Provo run to start at 7 instead of 6:30 we can free up a truck for the early WVF window.
How many stops on the 6 AM run.
Five SLC metro stops, right Andrew?
Five stops. Three cold chain, two dry. I can make it work if we stage the reefer the night before.
Do it. No disruption to existing routes.
I'll update the Tuesday schedule in Airtable. Andrew, want me to notify the drivers?
I'll handle driver comms. Need to confirm with Greg at WVF first that 6 AM works on their receiving end.
Confirmed by EOD Thursday.
Will do.
Also flagging, the Layton WVF stop on Wednesdays has been tight on dock space. Might want to mention that to Greg too.
BST is finally clear. Anyone want to grab a lunch ride this week? 🚴‍♂️
I'm out, my bike is still in winter mode 😅
Anyone know whose Subaru is in spot 12? They left their lights on.
Pretty sure that's Greg in finance. I'll go let him know.
demo deck draft is in google slides. bullets only, will fill in after we time the run-through
looked at it. swap slide 4 and 5 imo flows better
Daycare is closed this week (spring break). Pickup window is shifted -- I'll be online by 8 most days.
Noted.
Q1 wrap meeting Friday 3 PM. Project updates ready by then.
April WVF schedule is published. Peak loads on Tue/Wed.
Approved. New driver starts Monday.
All-hands moved to Wednesday 2 PM. Quarterly numbers + WVF Q2 plan.
Building access cards being reissued this week. Pick up from front desk.
Good meeting. Andrew, prepare the Q2 lane proposal for next Friday.
Will do.
rehearsed the full thing tonight, came in at 13:42
perfect. under 15 like we said
everything set for tmrw night. full rehearsal at 7 in the garage
friday rehearsal right? yeah ill be there
yep. lets time the whole thing. should be under 15 min
bet we got this 🔥
Quick FYI - had a doctor's appt this morning, back online now.
Tax day done. Anyone want to grab something at Beer Bar after work?
Cant tonight, Rosie has daycare pickup. Next week though.
Anyone want coffee from Beans & Brews? I'm walking down.
Large drip please, ill venmo you.
Q2 lane proposal is up. Highlights: WVF expansion to Cedar City + Tooele lane.
Looking. Set up time Friday to walk through.
Q2 planning kickoff next Monday. 9 AM. All hands.
